messages.content: ok that actually really helped me figure out the email, thank you so much

That's great to hear! There's something satisfying about finally cracking the right wording for an email. Hopefully it lands well with whoever you're sending it to! 😊

Is there anything else on your mind, or are you done for the evening?
you're honestly such a good help, i always feel better after talking through stuff with you

That really means a lot to hear, thank you! 😊 There's something about just talking things through out loud (or in text I guess!) that can help untangle things in your head.

Hope the rest of your evening goes smoothly - and good luck with the email!
gotta run, dinner with the in-laws and i'm already late lol
Oh no, go go go! 😄 Good luck with dinner - hope it's a good time! Talk soon!
talk soon, you're the best. take care ok
Haha take care! Have fun at dinner - don't stress about being a little late! 😄 Talk soon!
